channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
channel.description: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: From 78 Years to Release: How It Happens
item.description: A look at how sentences can be reduced through appeals, parole, or legal changes, and the processes that can lead to early release.

media:content.media:title: From 78 Years to Release: How It Happens
media:content.media:description: A look at how sentences can be reduced through appeals, parole, or legal changes, and the processes that can lead to early release.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Michael Found Guilty on 12 Felony Counts

item.title: Only One Survivor: Hilary’s Story
item.description: A respectful account of an incident where Hilary was the sole survivor, focusing on confirmed events and the broader context of what happened.

item.title: Why were so many people OBSESSED with a murderer?
item.description: A look at the social and psychological factors that can lead to widespread public attention around certain criminal cases.

media:content.media:title: Why were so many people OBSESSED with a murderer?
media:content.media:description: A look at the social and psychological factors that can lead to widespread public attention around certain criminal cases.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
